scripts.db:init: node -e "import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; import pg from 'pg'; const { Pool } = pg; const p = new Pool({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }); p.query(readFileSync('./init.sql', 'utf8')).then(() => { console.log('DB initialized'); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
